ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Purchasing_Status__c), "Purchase on Payment"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Purchasing_Status__c, "Purchase on Payment")), OR( ISBLANK(Purchasing_Status_Approver__c), ISBLANK(Purchasing_Approved_Date_Last_Reviewed__c) ) )) && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To change the purchasing status of this account, please add an approver and approved date.
